content: isdir  Table of contents Prototype: isdir(filename) Return type: boolean Description: Returns whether the named object filename is a directory. The CFEngine process must have access to filename in order for this to work. Arguments: filename : string - File object name - in the range: "?(/.*) Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "isdir" expression => isdir ( "/" ); reports : isdir :: "Directory exists.." ; } Output: code R: Directory exists.. See also: fileexists() , filestat() , islink() , isplain() , returnszero()
